notes: Spec asserts: ready → working → waiting when the assistant ends with a clarifying question. The recipe stops at the waiting episode and does NOT send a follow-up reply; the second-scenario coalesced-flush variant is covered by a separate recipe/test path (#150 synthesis is unit-tested). The trailing-? path goes through session.IsWaitingForUserInput → state_classifier.go decision 2a. Final state = waiting.

text: Assistant reply ends in '?' → session enters waiting (IsWaitingForUserInput → rule 2a)
